source: 很高兴你来了，这里是INS 杰里科军港，海军主要的补给站就在你面前，但是异种威胁埋伏在了军港附近，试图摧毁停泊在那的标枪；我需要你到军港那去来帮助抵御袭击。
target: Glad you made it. INS Jericho, the Navy's main resupply station is just ahead, but  XenoThreat forces ambushed the station and are trying to destroy the Javelin that's docked there. I'm gonna need you to get in there and help defend it.

messages.content:
Translate the following Star Citizen localization text into English. Only output the translation:

很高兴你来了，这里是INS 杰里科军港，海军主要的补给站就在你面前，但是异种威胁埋伏在了军港附近，试图摧毁停泊在那的标枪；我需要你到军港那去来帮助抵御袭击。

Glad you made it. INS Jericho, the Navy's main resupply station is just ahead, but  XenoThreat forces ambushed the station and are trying to destroy the Javelin that's docked there. I'm gonna need you to get in there and help defend it.

messages.content:

Glad you made it. INS Jericho, the Navy's main resupply station is just ahead, but  XenoThreat forces ambushed the station and are trying to destroy the Javelin that's docked there. I'm gonna need you to get in there and help defend it.

source: 嗨。抱歉，这事真是太丢脸了。我在上一座中转站有一堆东西要拿，结果大概就忘了补油。真是新手才会犯的错。总之，对不起，我们只要对接好，你就能早点离开这里。
target: Hi. Sorry, this is really embarassing. I had a bunch of things I needed to pick up from the last transfer station and I guess I forgot to get fuel. Such a rookie mistake. Anyway, sorry, if we can get docked, I can get you out of here.

Translate the following Star Citizen localization text into English. Only output the translation:

嗨。抱歉，这事真是太丢脸了。我在上一座中转站有一堆东西要拿，结果大概就忘了补油。真是新手才会犯的错。总之，对不起，我们只要对接好，你就能早点离开这里。

Hi. Sorry, this is really embarassing. I had a bunch of things I needed to pick up from the last transfer station and I guess I forgot to get fuel. Such a rookie mistake. Anyway, sorry, if we can get docked, I can get you out of here.

source: Hi. Sorry, this is really embarassing. I had a bunch of things I needed to pick up from the last transfer station and I guess I forgot to get fuel. Such a rookie mistake. Anyway, sorry, if we can get docked, I can get you out of here.
target: 嗨。抱歉，这事真是太丢脸了。我在上一座中转站有一堆东西要拿，结果大概就忘了补油。真是新手才会犯的错。总之，对不起，我们只要对接好，你就能早点离开这里。

messages.content:

source: 听好了，我们截获到了些消息；看来九尾想要开溜了，但十字军可不会让他们得逞；我们得继续施加压力，立刻给这事做个了结。
target: Listen up. Intel picked up some comm traffic. Seems the Nine Tails might try to make a break for it. Crusader can't afford to let them get away. We need to step up the pressure and put an end to this, now.

messages.content:
Translate the following Star Citizen localization text into English. Only output the translation:

听好了，我们截获到了些消息；看来九尾想要开溜了，但十字军可不会让他们得逞；我们得继续施加压力，立刻给这事做个了结。

Listen up. Intel picked up some comm traffic. Seems the Nine Tails might try to make a break for it. Crusader can't afford to let them get away. We need to step up the pressure and put an end to this, now.

target: 听好了，我们截获到了些消息；看来九尾想要开溜了，但十字军可不会让他们得逞；我们得继续施加压力，立刻给这事做个了结。

Listen up. Intel picked up some comm traffic. Seems the Nine Tails might try to make a break for it. Crusader can't afford to let them get away. We need to step up the pressure and put an end to this, now.

source: 太空作战机动模式是战斗和非战斗飞行时的常用模式。你的大部分飞行时间都将在这种模式下进行。当你想在速度和漂移控制之间取得最佳平衡的时候.，请选择此模式。
target: Space Combat Maneuvering mode is the normal mode for combat and non-combat flight. Most of your flight time will be spent in this mode. Select this mode any time you wish to have the optimal balance of velocity and drift control.

messages.content:

太空作战机动模式是战斗和非战斗飞行时的常用模式。你的大部分飞行时间都将在这种模式下进行。当你想在速度和漂移控制之间取得最佳平衡的时候.，请选择此模式。

Space Combat Maneuvering mode is the normal mode for combat and non-combat flight. Most of your flight time will be spent in this mode. Select this mode any time you wish to have the optimal balance of velocity and drift control.

source: 那是最后一个。你现在应该能进入空间站支臂了。如果你往里面走，每条支臂里都有三台护盾发生器。我们得把它们打掉，才能接近空间站的动力核心。

That was the last one. You should have access to the station arms. If you make your way inside, there are three shield generators per arm. We'll need to take them out to get access to the power core of the station.

source: 嘿，我是艾尔。是这样吗？你说你最后还是不能跑一趟？大概吧。有点奇怪，不过行吧，不能跑就是不能跑。现在才打电话过去，我自己也不太清楚为什么……
target: Hey, it's El. Is this right? Says you can't do the run after all? I guess so. That's a little weird. But okay, if you can't do it you can't do it. Not sure why I called now…

messages.content:
Translate the following Star Citizen localization text into English. Only output the translation:

嘿，我是艾尔。是这样吗？你说你最后还是不能跑一趟？大概吧。有点奇怪，不过行吧，不能跑就是不能跑。现在才打电话过去，我自己也不太清楚为什么……
Hey, it's El. Is this right? Says you can't do the run after all? I guess so. That's a little weird. But okay, if you can't do it you can't do it. Not sure why I called now…

source: Hey, it's El. Is this right? Says you can't do the run after all? I guess so. That's a little weird. But okay, if you can't do it you can't do it. Not sure why I called now…
target: 嘿，我是艾尔。是这样吗？你说你最后还是不能跑一趟？大概吧。有点奇怪，不过行吧，不能跑就是不能跑。现在才打电话过去，我自己也不太清楚为什么……

messages.content:
